2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX
26 - 28 Jun 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 17
Date 26 June 2026
Time 14:48
Title Infringement - Free Practice 1 Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Free Practice 1 Deleted Lap Times

Felix Holter Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Wilhelm Singer

 
 
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 
26 – 28 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 17 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  26 June 2026 
 
        Time  14:48 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Free Practice 1 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1, 3, 4 and 8. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time

4 1 12 Kimi Antonelli Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team 13:41:37 1:33.599

6 3 46 Luke Brow
